operation.name: write_at_dr_w_dev_read
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun off () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert
        (let
            (
             (?B1
                 (concat 
                         (select 
                                 len
                                 (_ bv7 32)
                         )
                         (concat 
                                 (select 
                                         len
                                         (_ bv6 32)
                                 )
                                 (concat 
                                         (select 
                                                 len
                                                 (_ bv5 32)
                                         )
                                         (concat 
                                                 (select 
                                                         len
                                                         (_ bv4 32)
                                                 )
                                                 (concat 
                                                         (select 
                                                                 len
                                                                 (_ bv3 32)
                                                         )
                                                         (concat 
                                                                 (select 
                                                                         len
                                                                         (_ bv2 32)
                                                                 )
                                                                 (concat 
                                                                         (select 
                                                                                 len
                                                                                 (_ bv1 32)
                                                                         )
                                                                         (select 
                                                                                 len
                                                                                 (_ bv0 32)
                                                                         )
                                                                 )
                                                         )
                                                 )
                                         )
                                 )
                         )
                 )
             )
             (?B2
                 (concat 
                         (select 
                                 off
                                 (_ bv7 32)
                         )
                         (concat 
                                 (select 
                                         off
                                         (_ bv6 32)
                                 )
                                 (concat 
                                         (select 
                                                 off
                                                 (_ bv5 32)
                                         )
                                         (concat 
                                                 (select 
                                                         off
                                                         (_ bv4 32)
                                                 )
                                                 (concat 
                                                         (select 
                                                                 off
                                                                 (_ bv3 32)
                                                         )
                                                         (concat 
                                                                 (select 
                                                                         off
                                                                         (_ bv2 32)
                                                                 )
                                                                 (concat 
                                                                         (select 
                                                                                 off
                                                                                 (_ bv1 32)
                                                                         )
                                                                         (select 
                                                                                 off
                                                                                 (_ bv0 32)
                                                                         )
                                                                 )
                                                         )
                                                 )
                                         )
                                 )
                         )
                 )
             )
            )
            (and 
                 (and 
                      (and 
                           (bvult 
                                  (_ bv0 64)
                                  ?B1
                           )
                           (bvule 
                                  ?B1
                                  (_ bv256 64)
                           )
                      )
                      (bvslt 
                             (_ bv100 64)
                             ?B2
                      )
                 )
                 (bvslt 
                        ?B2
                        (_ bv65536 64)
                 )
            )
        )
)
(check-sat)
(exit)

metadata.bug_type: CWE-787 (OOB_WRITE): Array index write where index is a length-like value (off-by-one / past-last-byte)
